name: Garden Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut eggplant into 1/2 inch thick slices and sprinkle both sides with salt. Place in a deep dish; cover and let stand for 30 minutes. Rinse with cold water, drain, and dry on paper towels.
2. Cut the eggplant into 1/2 inch cubes and sauté in oil until lightly browned (about 5 minutes).
3. Add onions, garlic, zucchini, tomatoes, celery, parsley, basil, pepper, and remaining salt to the pan; bring to a boil.
4. Reduce heat and cover; simmer for 10 minutes. Stir in Romano cheese.
5. Pour into a greased 9 x 13 baking dish. Combine crumbs and butter; sprinkle on top.
6. Bake, uncovered, at 375°F for 15 minutes. Sprinkle with mozzarella cheese. Return to the oven for 5 minutes or until cheese is melted.
